result.stdout:
Usage: [command] [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Default Run

Arguments:
  [0] <string>     script.cszx
  [1] <string?>    args

Options:
  -fr|--target-frame-work <string>     (Default: "net8.0")
  -xv|--processx-version <string>     https://github.com/Cysharp/ProcessX (Default: "1.5.5")
  -sr|--stop-error                     (Optional)

Commands:
  e             Edit
  install       Add Run ZxScript and Edit ZxScript to the right-click menu of .cs
  rc            ResetCache
  sac           SettingsAddCs. Adds a C# file reference to the current settings.
  sapa          SettingsAddPackage
  sapr          SettingsAddProject. Adds a project reference to the current settings.
  sl            SettingList
  src           SettingsRemoveCs. Removes a C# file reference from the current settings.
  srpa          SettingsRemovePackage. Removes a package reference from the current settings.
  srpr          SettingsRemoveProject. Removes a project reference from the current settings.
  un-install    Remove right-click menu

result.stdout:
Usage: sac [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

SettingsAddCs. Adds a C# file reference to the current settings.

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    The path to the C# file (.cs) to add.

Options:
  -sd|--setting-directory <string>    The directory where the settings file is located. Defaults to the current directory. (Default: ".")
